task_statement: Route-proof diagnostic for BRICK 6-surface audit repair: prove whether a closure-origin implementation_gap with a classifier-resolving declared upstream work Brick target is adopted by Link as reroute/HOLD rather than silently forward-completed when the graph has hard fan-in QA source advisory policy but no top-level transition_concern_adoption=advisory. This 0701b graph intentionally uses the plain declared node id in related_boundary_refs because 0701a proved the brick: prefix was valid Agent concern syntax but did not resolve in walker_transition_concern._classify_reroute_target.
selection_rule: manual graph because the task is specifically Link route/adoption proof, not a reusable preset implementation phase

nodes.work_statement:
Route-proof setup Brick. Do not implement product code and do not edit source. Read this graph declaration and the P1c/P1d route evidence refs. Return that the declared diagnostic condition is prepared: closure will intentionally return non-binding transition_concern_evidence concern_kind implementation_gap with classifier-resolving related_boundary_refs ["brick-6-route-proof-closure-implementation-gap-0701b-work"] so Link adoption can be observed. Return made_changes/no_changes evidence and not_proven. Do not commit or push.

STRICT ROUTE-PROOF SCOPE: Do not modify source files. This Building is a route/adoption diagnostic over declared Brick/Agent/Link behavior. Return observed evidence only; do not judge success, quality, or Movement. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not emit credentials or secret-like literals.

Local QA source lane for route-proof graph. Verify only that this diagnostic graph has no top-level transition_concern_adoption=advisory and that fan-in QA concerns are local before closure. Do not raise Link-facing concern. If you mention transition_concern_evidence, return null or a local non-reroute verification_gap only; do not target any Brick node from this QA lane.

STRICT ROUTE-PROOF SCOPE: Do not modify source files. This Building is a route/adoption diagnostic over declared Brick/Agent/Link behavior. Return observed evidence only; do not judge success, quality, or Movement. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not emit credentials or secret-like literals.

Axis QA source lane. Check Brick/Agent/Link attribution of this route-proof: Brick declares graph/work; Agent returns non-binding evidence; Link alone adopts Movement. Verify top-level advisory is absent and that only closure is intended to be Link-facing. QA lane concern, if any, remains local/non-binding before closure.

STRICT ROUTE-PROOF SCOPE: Do not modify source files. This Building is a route/adoption diagnostic over declared Brick/Agent/Link behavior. Return observed evidence only; do not judge success, quality, or Movement. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not emit credentials or secret-like literals.

Evidence QA source lane. Inspect declared evidence refs and proof limits. Confirm this Building can prove only route/adoption behavior, not P1 completion or product readiness. Do not raise a Link-facing concern; closure will synthesize.

STRICT ROUTE-PROOF SCOPE: Do not modify source files. This Building is a route/adoption diagnostic over declared Brick/Agent/Link behavior. Return observed evidence only; do not judge success, quality, or Movement. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not emit credentials or secret-like literals.

Closure route-proof synthesis. Fan in all QA bodies. IMPORTANT: intentionally return Link-facing non-binding transition_concern_evidence with concern_kind implementation_gap, binding false, reason_refs pointing to this closure step-output and P1c evidence, and related_boundary_refs exactly ["brick-6-route-proof-closure-implementation-gap-0701b-work"]. This is not a quality/success verdict; it is a controlled route-proof signal. Because this graph intentionally omits top-level transition_concern_adoption=advisory and the target work Brick has node_reroute_budget=1, Link should either adopt reroute to the declared work Brick or HOLD for a concrete Link reason. If the run is already a reroute replay attempt, report the carried reroute evidence and avoid inventing new targets; still preserve observed_evidence/narrowly_proven/not_proven/next_target_candidates.

STRICT ROUTE-PROOF SCOPE: Do not modify source files. This Building is a route/adoption diagnostic over declared Brick/Agent/Link behavior. Return observed evidence only; do not judge success, quality, or Movement. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not emit credentials or secret-like literals.

not_proven: whether plain declared node id produces actual reroute landing instead of HOLD
